CREATE TABLE test_ks (value Float64, num Int32);
CREATE TABLE test_ks_large AS (SELECT randNormal(0, 10) AS value, 0 AS num FROM numbers(10000) UNION ALL SELECT randNormal(0, 10) AS value, 1 AS num FROM numbers(10000));

SELECT kolmogorovSmirnovTest('less', 'exact')(value, num) FROM (SELECT randExponential(1) AS value, 0 AS num FROM numbers(100) UNION ALL SELECT randExponential(1) AS value, 1 AS num FROM numbers(100));

SELECT kolmogorovSmirnovTest('two-sided', 'exact')(value, num) FROM (SELECT randUniform(0, 1) AS value, 0 AS num FROM numbers(100) UNION ALL SELECT randUniform(0, 1) AS value, 1 AS num FROM numbers(100));
SELECT kolmogorovSmirnovTest('greater', 'exact')(value, num) FROM (SELECT randNormal(5, 1) AS value, 0 AS num FROM numbers(30) UNION ALL SELECT randNormal(5, 2) AS value, 1 AS num FROM numbers(30));

WITH (SELECT randNormal(0, 1) AS value, num FROM (SELECT randNormal(0, 1) AS value, 0 AS num FROM numbers(50) UNION ALL SELECT randNormal(0, 1) AS value, 1 AS num FROM numbers(50))) AS samples SELECT kolmogorovSmirnovTest('greater', 'auto')(value, num) FROM samples;
CREATE TABLE test_ks_mixed AS SELECT randNormal(0, 10) AS value, (number % 2) AS num FROM numbers(10000);
